page_content:
HLSA792 Health Services Portfolio Seminar | (3 Credits)

Assists doctoral pre-candidates at the end of their coursework with completing the required research portfolio requirements. Restriction: Must be in a major in SPHL-School of Public Health; or permission of instructor.

HLSA793 Health Services Portfolio Seminar II (3 Credits)

Introduces students to the main sections of a publishable paper. This

is an applied course so students are expected to learn how to critique a research article and how to write a publishable one. By the end of this course, each student is expected to have written a publishable paper with a formal abstract, specific to their research topic.

Restriction: Must be in a major in SPHL-School of Public Health; or permission of instructor.
